title: fumaria officinalis subsp. densiflora
intro: Fumaria officinalis subsp. densiflora, also known as Damp-Field Fumitory, is a subspecies of the Fumaria officinalis plant, a flowering plant in the fumitory family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Fumaria officinalis subsp. densiflora include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Fumaria officinalis subsp. densiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
